meaning: n.面具,掩饰,石膏面像vt.戴面具,掩饰,使模糊vi.化装,戴面具,掩饰,参加化装舞会
examples: The gunman, whose mask had slipped, fled.
Dina lit a cigarette, trying to mask her agitation.
This mask leaves your complexion feeling soft and supple.
One, in a seeming insult to the increasingly glorious views streaming by, dons a sleeping mask.
The idea of the V mask being appropriated as a political symbol is inherently ridiculous, he suggests.
